evals.prompt: What companies raised funding this week?
evals.expected_output: A routed Fundable /companies search over a 7-day date window returning recently funded companies with their latest deal.
assertions: The skill issues a single routed (MPP) step to https://tryfundable.ai/companies
The request body sets latest_deal.date_start to ~7 days before today and latest_deal.date_end to today
The output lists companies with their latest funding round (type, size, date)

evals.prompt: Show me seed rounds from the last month.
evals.expected_output: A routed Fundable search filtered to financing_types SEED over a ~30-day window.
assertions: The body includes latest_deal.financing_types with type SEED
The step rail is routed and method is POST

evals.prompt: What fintech companies recently raised a Series A?
evals.expected_output: A routed Fundable search with financingType SERIES_A and a fintech industry permalink.
assertions: The body includes latest_deal.financing_types with type SERIES_A
The body includes company.industries with a fintech permalink

evals.prompt: List the biggest funding rounds over $10M from the past week.
evals.expected_output: A routed Fundable search with size_min 10000000 and sort_by largest_total_raise or most_recent_raise.
assertions: The body includes latest_deal.size_min set to 10000000
The per-step maxAmount is 0.066 and is not exceeded
The skill uses only the routed rail with no direct or x402 step

evals.prompt: Validate the recent funding rounds endpoint without paying.
evals.expected_output: A free 402 probe against the Fundable /companies endpoint via selat-pay --probe-only.
assertions: The validation command uses selat-pay POST https://tryfundable.ai/companies with --probe-only
No payment is broadcast during the probe
The output reflects the 402 payment requirements rather than a 200 data response

evals.prompt: How does this skill call Fundable under the hood?
evals.expected_output: The skill is declarative: the selat CLI compiles the manifest step into a payment; it never shells out to orth or api.orth.sh.
assertions: The manifest contains no orth, orth run, or api.orth.sh references
Execution is via selat skill run / selat-pay over the SELAT Router
The single step is a plain method+url+body JSON object
